hero.text: Today is a day of transformation and opportunity.
hero.author: Anonymous

aries.general: Expect unexpected changes that will take your life to new heights.
aries.love: Open your heart and let love guide your decisions today.
aries.career: With determination and courage, challenges become stepping stones.

taurus.general: A day to indulge in your senses; treat yourself and recharge.
taurus.love: Stability in your love life brings a sense of peace.
taurus.career: Your persistence will pay off; keep pushing towards your goals.

gemini.general: Communication is key; express your ideas clearly.
gemini.love: Don’t hesitate to show vulnerability in your relationships.
gemini.career: Collaborative efforts will yield positive outcomes; engage with your team.

cancer.general: Focus on home and family; your support will be invaluable.
cancer.love: Open up about your feelings; honesty will strengthen bonds.
cancer.career: Pay attention to details; they can make or break your progress.

leo.general: Your charisma shines today; take the lead in social settings.
leo.love: Romance is in the air; surprise your partner with a grand gesture.
leo.career: Embrace creativity in your projects to stand out.

virgo.general: Focus on organization; a tidy space leads to a tidy mind.
virgo.love: Small gestures of love will have a big impact today.
virgo.career: Your analytical skills will solve lingering issues at work.

libra.general: Seek harmony in your surroundings and relationships.
libra.love: Balance your needs with those of your partner; compromise is key.
libra.career: Teamwork will elevate your projects; embrace group dynamics.

scorpio.general: Tap into your intuition; it will guide you through complex situations.
scorpio.love: Passion runs deep today; express your feelings freely.
scorpio.career: Harness your determination; it's a great day to tackle your challenges.

sagittarius.general: Adventure awaits; step out of your comfort zone today.
sagittarius.love: Spontaneity brings excitement to your relationships.
sagittarius.career: Explore new avenues; innovative ideas could lead to success.

capricorn.general: Stay focused on your goals; perseverance will be rewarded soon.
capricorn.love: Patience in love brings strength; nurture your relationship.
capricorn.career: Your efforts and discipline are being recognized; keep it up.

aquarius.general: Embrace new perspectives; today is about seeing things differently.
aquarius.love: Connecting on a deeper level with friends can lead to romance.
aquarius.career: Innovative thinking will set you apart; showcase your unique ideas.

pisces.general: Harness your creativity; it can be a powerful tool today.
pisces.love: Emotional connections run deep; share your dreams with a loved one.
pisces.career: Trust your instincts; they will guide you toward the right choices.

professional.text: Success is not the key to happiness. Happiness is the key to success.
professional.author: Albert Schweitzer

professional.text: The future depends on what you do today.
professional.author: Mahatma Gandhi

professional.text: Don't watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going.
professional.author: Sam Levenson

professional.text: Opportunities don't happen; you create them.
professional.author: Chris Grosser

professional.text: It does not matter how slowly you go as long as you do not stop.
professional.author: Confucius

professional.text: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
professional.author: Theodore Roosevelt

motivation.text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
motivation.author: Steve Jobs

motivation.text: Dream big and dare to fail.
motivation.author: Norman Vaughan

motivation.text: You are never too old to set another goal or to dream a new dream.
motivation.author: C.S. Lewis

motivation.text: Keep your eyes on the stars, and your feet on the ground.
motivation.author: Theodore Roosevelt

motivation.text: The only limit to our realization of tomorrow is our doubts of today.
motivation.author: Franklin D. Roosevelt

motivation.text: Act as if what you do makes a difference. It does.
motivation.author: William James

captions.text: Rise above the storm, and you will find the sunshine.
captions.author: Mario Fernandez

captions.text: Be the energy you want to attract.
captions.author: Anonymous

captions.text: Dream without fear, love without limits.
captions.author: Anonymous

captions.text: Life is short. Make every hair flip fabulous.
captions.author: Anonymous

tech.text: The best way to predict the future is to invent it.
tech.author: Alan Kay

tech.text: Technology is best when it brings people together.
tech.author: Matt Mullenweg

tech.text: It's not a faith in technology. It's faith in people.
tech.author: Steve Jobs

tech.text: Innovation distinguishes between a leader and a follower.
tech.author: Steve Jobs

tech.text: The real problem is not whether machines think but whether men do.
tech.author: B.F. Skinner

tech.text: Technology is a useful servant but a dangerous master.
tech.author: Christian Lous Lange

fun.text: Life is more fun if you play games.
fun.author: Roald Dahl

fun.text: Why so serious? Let's have some fun!
fun.author: Anonymous

fun.text: Get your daily dose of Vitamin Sea.
fun.author: Anonymous

fun.text: Take a break and laugh it off!
fun.author: Anonymous

faith.text: Faith is taking the first step even when you don't see the whole staircase.
faith.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

faith.text: Everything is possible for one who believes.
faith.author: Mark 9:23

faith.text: Faith is the strength by which a shattered world shall emerge into the light.
faith.author: Helen Keller

faith.text: For I know the plans I have for you, declares the Lord.
faith.author: Jeremiah 29:11

faith.text: The only limit to our realization of tomorrow is our doubts of today.
faith.author: Franklin D. Roosevelt

faith.text: Let your faith be bigger than your fear.
faith.author: Anonymous

wisdom.text: The only true wisdom is in knowing you know nothing.
wisdom.author: Socrates

wisdom.text: Do not dwell in the past, do not dream of the future, concentrate the mind on the present moment.
wisdom.author: Buddha

wisdom.text: In the middle of every difficulty lies opportunity.
wisdom.author: Albert Einstein

wisdom.text: It is not the strongest of the species that survive, nor the most intelligent, but the one most responsive to change.
wisdom.author: Charles Darwin

wisdom.text: The mind is everything. What you think you become.
wisdom.author: Buddha
